race.comment: ANGEL CITY (6) rewarded for her consistency fourth-up with a dominant victory over 1500m at Goulburn in the soft (7) going. Finds a fairly average BM58 and her confidence is high. Go close. TIMELESS GRACE (10) stretched out to the 1600m for the first time with a battling sixth at Canberra. Earlier runs had merit and gets another chance. THE STARS ALIGN (5) chipped away late in his two runs back and should be ready to hit the frame in this average contest. Winning rider hops back on from the good gate. STRAIGHT FIRE (1) given the gun run in transit but failed to close off with a poor fifth 1600m at Dubbo in BM66 class. This is much easier and can improve with the tongue-tie going on. RADION (12) mixing his form and had genuine excuses at latest from the outside draw. Back in trip and stays in the mix.
